name: LifeOS
title: LifeOS - Personal Resilience & Life Management Dashboard
description: LifeOS is a free, open-source personal resilience dashboard for budgeting, pantry tracking, emergency preparedness, habits, inventory, and daily life management.
author: Michael Schwartz
html:
LifeOS

organize your life, prepare for emergencies, and build stability from one simple dashboard.

❤️ Donate
local & private · offline first · open source (MIT)

📡 Dashboard · vital signals

💰 Money left (weekly)
after essentials & bills
📅 Bills coming up

✔ no bills due soon

🍅 Expiring soon

✓ pantry fresh

🛡️ Emergency fund
✅ Habits today
stability routines
⚡ Preparedness score
emergency readiness

💰 Budget · cash flow

survival number: /week

Income

Expenses & bills

🎯 Debt payoff
Remaining:
📈 Monthly net:
🎯 Savings:

🥫 Pantry · food inventory

🍽️ Emergency days: days

➕ add food items to track expiration

⚠️ Low stock alert:

🪖 Emergency prep · readiness

🏠 Go-bag · water · power outage · family contact plan

🌱 Daily stability habits

🧰 Home inventory · survival gear

🏷️ repair · sell · donate · replace

📓 Notes & emergency plans

🔒 saved locally, never leaves your device

LifeOS — resilience toolkit. All data stored in your browser. MIT open source. ❤️ Support LifeOS
